name: google-ads-mcp
description: MCP server for Google Ads - search ad account data and list accessible customers
long_description: Connect Claude to your Google Ads accounts. Run GAQL queries to search campaigns, ad groups, keywords, and performance data. List accessible customer accounts.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Fetch data from the Google Ads API using GAQL queries - campaigns, ad groups, keywords, performance metrics

tools.name: list_accessible_customers
tools.description: List IDs of Google Ads customer accounts accessible by the authenticated user

google_application_credentials.title: Google Application Credentials
google_application_credentials.description: Path to your Google service account credentials JSON file

google_ads_developer_token.title: Google Ads Developer Token
google_ads_developer_token.description: Your Google Ads API developer token

google_ads_login_customer_id.title: Login Customer ID
google_ads_login_customer_id.description: Manager account customer ID (digits only, no hyphens) - required only if accessing via a manager account
